effect.lne_paladins.holy_prevention.desc: Heals you when you fall below 20% max health, the heal amount enhances with effect amplifier. If you´re already under 20% when the effect is applied, the healing is reduced.
effect.lne_paladins.holy_weapon.descript: Enhances your melee hits with heals and additional healing power damage, 100% crit chance against undead.
spell.lne_paladins.elder_guardian_shield: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to inflict bleeding for {effect_duration} seconds and deal {damage} damage.
spell.lne_paladins.ender_dragon_shield.d: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to create an explosive burst dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
spell.lne_paladins.glacial_shield.descri: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to freeze nearby enemies for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.lne_paladins.glacial_shield.name: Glacial Shield
spell.lne_paladins.holy_prevention.descr: Apply a protective effect to target for {effect_duration} seconds, reducing incoming damage.
spell.lne_paladins.holy_prevention.name: Holy Prevention
spell.lne_paladins.holy_weapon.descripti: Empower your weapon for {stash_duration} seconds. Melee attacks deal {damage} damage and heal you.
spell.lne_paladins.holy_weapon.name: Holy Weapon
spell.lne_paladins.sirens_tears.descript: On healing: {trigger_chance} chance to remove harmful effects and apply regeneration for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.lne_paladins.sirens_tears.name: Siren's Tears
spell.lne_paladins.wither_shield.descrip: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to shoot 3 wither skulls dealing {damage} damage and inflicting wither.
spell.lne_paladins.wither_shield.name: Wither Shield
